items.name: Mask of Death
items.description: The hero recovers hit points equal to 30% of the attack damage dealt to enemy units. Compatible - stacks with other Unique effects. Non-Stackable with other Passive Lifesteal effects.
items.notes: Stacks with other Unique orbs; does NOT stack with other lifesteal

items.name: Orb of Corruption
items.description: Adds 5 bonus damage to the attack of a hero when carried. Hero's attacks also become ranged. Reduces the armor of every enemy by 5 for 5 seconds.

items.name: Orb of Darkness
items.description: Adds 5 bonus damage to the attack of a Hero when carried. Hero's attacks become ranged. Creates a Dark Minion when it is the killing blow on an enemy unit. The Dark Minion lasts 80 seconds.

items.name: Orb of Fire
items.description: Adds 5 bonus damage to the attack of a Hero when carried. Hero's attacks become ranged and reduce the effectiveness of healing and regeneration on enemy units by 35% for 5 seconds. Grants the hero 35% splash damage in an area of 250.

items.name: Orb of Frost
items.description: Adds 6 bonus damage to the attack of a hero. Hero's attacks become ranged and slow the movement of an enemy by 25% for 1.5 seconds.

items.name: Orb of Lightning
items.description: Adds 5 bonus damage to the attack of a Hero when carried. Hero's attacks become ranged and have a chance to dispel magic and immobilize the enemy for 3 seconds (slowly regains movement over 1.5 seconds). Deals 200 bonus damage to summoned units.

items.name: Orb of Slow
items.description: Adds 5 bonus damage to the attack of a Hero when carried. Hero's attacks become ranged and have a 15% chance to slow a target enemy's movement speed by 55% and attack rate by 25%.

items.name: Orb of Venom
items.description: Adds 5 bonus damage to the attack of a Hero when carried. Hero's attacks become ranged and poison enemy units, dealing 1.5 damage per second.

items.name: Belt of Giant Strength +6
items.description: Increases the strength of the hero by 6.

items.name: Boots of Quel'Thalas +6
items.description: Increases the agility of the hero by 6.

items.name: Crown of Kings +5
items.description: Increases the strength, agility and intelligence by 5.

items.name: Gloves of Haste +20%
items.description: Increases the attack speed of the hero by 20%.

items.name: Helm of Valor +5
items.description: Increases the strength and agility by 5.

items.name: Hood of Cunning +5
items.description: Increases the agility and intelligence by 5.

items.name: Medallion of Courage +5
items.description: Increases the strength and intelligence by 5.

items.name: Ring of Regeneration +6
items.description: Increases the life regeneration of the hero by 6.

items.name: Ring of the Archmagi +3
items.description: Increases the strength, agility and intelligence by 3.

items.name: Robe of the Magi +6
items.description: Increases the intelligence of the hero by 6.

items.name: Sobi Mask 65%
items.description: Increases the mana regeneration of the hero by 65%.

items.name: Talisman of Evasion 9%
items.description: Gives the hero a 9% chance to evade physical attacks.

items.name: Battle Standard
items.description: Auras: Devotion (+5 armor), War Drums (+10% dmg), Brilliance (+1% mana regen), Endurance (+5% move & +5% attack rate), Thorns (10% reflect to melee), Unholy (+5% move & +1 life regen). Active: Increases movement speed of hero and nearby allies to maximum for 10 seconds.

items.name: Boots of Speed
items.description: Increases the movement speed of the hero by 60.

items.name: Chicken
items.description: Creates a fast unit (Animal Courier) that can carry items from the base.

items.name: Dust of Appearance
items.description: Reveals invisible units in an area for 20 seconds.

items.name: Flute of Accuracy
items.description: Auras: Devotion (+3 armor), Thorns (10% reflect to melee), Brilliance (mana regen), Endurance (+5% move & +5% attack rate), Unholy (+5% move & +1 life regen).

items.name: Flying Sheep
items.description: Creates a fast flying unit (Flying Courier) with divine shield that can carry items for you.

items.name: Mechanical Critter
items.description: Creates a player-controlled critter that can be used to scout enemies.

items.name: Peasant
items.description: Summons a Peasant to repair buildings. Restores 1000 hit points to towers or 500 hit points to the Base.

items.name: Staff of Teleportation
items.description: Increases the movement speed of the hero by 60 (non-stackable). Active Teleport: Teleports the hero to the targeted ally or structure.

items.name: Warsong Battle Drums
items.description: Auras: War Drums (+10% dmg), Brilliance (mana regen), Endurance (+5% move & +5% attack rate), Thorns (reflect to melee), Unholy (+5% move & +1 life regen).

items.name: Boots of Health
items.description: Increases the movement speed of the hero by 60 (non-stackable). Increases the hit points of the hero by 200 and attack damage by 10.

items.name: Boots of Mana
items.description: Increases the movement speed of the hero by 60 (non-stackable). Increases the mana of the hero by 200 and attack damage by 10.

items.name: Scepter of Avarice
items.description: Kills a target unit instantly. Cannot be used on units with Resistant Skin or creeps above level 6. Buy only to kill an enemy mercenary unit.

items.name: Frost Claw
items.description: The hero's attacks become ranged when attacking an enemy unit and have a chance to dispel magic and slow the movement speed of the enemy by 25% for 5 seconds.
items.notes: Unique - Does not stack with other Unique effects

items.name: Lightning Claws
items.description: The hero's attacks become ranged when attacking an enemy unit and have a chance to dispel magic and slow the movement speed of the enemy for 5 seconds. Deals 600 bonus damage to summoned units.
items.notes: Unique - Does not stack with other Unique effects

items.name: Firebrand Gauntlets
items.description: The hero's attacks become ranged and reduce the effectiveness of healing and regeneration on enemy units by 35% for 5 seconds. Grants the hero 35% splash damage in an area of 250.
items.notes: Unique - Does not stack with other Unique effects

items.name: Corrupted Gauntlets
items.description: The hero's attacks become ranged when attacking an enemy unit and reduce the armor of enemy units by 8 for 5 seconds.
items.notes: Unique - Does not stack with other Unique effects

items.name: Trueshot Shield
items.description: Passive Trueshot Aura: Increases attack damage of ranged units by 22%.

items.name: Command Shield
items.description: Passive Command Aura: Increases attack damage of friendly units by 22%.

items.name: Unholy Shield
items.description: Passive Unholy Aura: Grants 10% movement speed and +1 life regeneration. Active Unholy Energy: Increases the attack rate of a target unit by 75% (non-stackable with Unholy Energy). Duration: 60. Mana: 50.
items.notes: Active non-stackable with other Unholy Energy

items.name: Vampiric Shield
items.description: Passive Vampiric Aura: Grants life steal on attacks to melee units of 35%.

items.name: Shield of the Deathlord
items.description: Gives the hero a 20% chance to evade physical attacks. Engulfs the hero in fire which deals 40 damage per second to nearby enemy land units.

items.name: Runed Bracers
items.description: Reduces spell damage dealt to the hero by 33% (non-stackable).

items.name: Devotion Shield
items.description: Passive Devotion Aura: Increases the armor of nearby friendly units by 6.

items.name: Voodoo Doll
items.description: Active Hex: Transforms an enemy unit into a random critter, disabling special abilities.

items.name: Rusty Mining Pick +10
items.description: Passive Bash: 5% chance to stun the target for 1 second and deal 3.5 bonus damage per stack. Increases the attack damage of the hero by 10 per stack.

items.name: Sturdy War Axe +12
items.description: Passive Critical Strike: 3% chance to deal 2 times more total damage. Increases the attack damage of the hero by 12 per stack.

items.name: Serathil +12
items.description: Increases the attack speed of the hero by 12% and attack damage by 12 per stack.

items.name: Cleaving Axe +12
items.description: Passive Cleaving Attack: Deals 10% of attack damage as cleave per stack in a radius of 255. Increases the attack damage of the hero by 12 per stack.

items.name: Claws of Attack +15
items.description: Increases the attack damage of the hero by 15 per stack.

items.name: Ring of Protection +5
items.description: Increases the armor of the hero by 5 per stack.

items.name: Gem of Health 250
items.description: Increases the hit points of the hero by 250 per stack.

items.name: Pendant of Mana 200
items.description: Increases the mana capacity of the hero by 200 per stack.

items.name: Crown of the Deathlord
items.description: Active Finger of Death: Fires a bolt of pain that deals 125 magic damage. Increases the hit points of the hero by 50 per stack.

items.name: Thunderlizard Diamond 100
items.description: Active Chain Lightning: Casts a bolt of lightning that deals 100 magic damage. Jumps up to 5 times, each jump dealing 25% less damage. Increases the mana of the hero by 45 per stack.

items.name: Cloak of Flames +12
items.description: Permanent Immolation: Deals 6 damage every 0.5 seconds per stack in a radius of 300. Does not stack with other Immolation effects.
items.notes: Does not stack with other Immolation effects

items.name: Amulet of Spell Shield +5
items.description: Passive Spell Block: Blocks a negative spell that an enemy casts on the hero. Cooldown: 45 seconds.

items.name: Lesser Clarity Potion
items.description: Non-Combat Consumable: Regenerates 230 mana over 30 seconds when used.

items.name: Scroll of Speed
items.description: Active Speed Bonus: Increases the movement speed of the hero and nearby allied units to the maximum movement speed.

items.name: Health Stone
items.description: Consumes: Instantly restores 500 hit points. While carried: increases the life regeneration of the hero by 1.
items.notes: Passive regen bonus while in inventory

items.name: Mana Stone
items.description: Consumes: Instantly restores 250 mana. While carried: increases the mana regeneration of the hero by 25%.
items.notes: Passive mana regen bonus while in inventory

items.name: Wand of Illusion
items.description: Active Illusion: Creates an illusory double of the targeted unit. The illusion deals no damage to enemy units, takes 2 times the damage from enemy attacks, and disappears after 60 seconds or when its hit points reach zero.

items.name: Potion of Invisibility
items.description: Active Invisibility: Renders the hero invisible for 120 seconds. An invisible hero is untargetable by the enemy unless detected. Invisibility is lost if the hero attacks, uses a damage spell, or casts a fight spell.
items.notes: Breaks on attack or spell cast

items.name: Sentry Wards
items.description: Active Sentry Ward: Summons an invisible and magic immune ward that provides vision in an area and reveals invisible units.
items.notes: Ward is invisible and magic immune

items.name: Watcher Ward
items.description: Active Watcher Ward: Summons an invisible and invulnerable ward that provides vision in an area and reveals invisible units.

items.name: Wand of the Wind
items.description: Active Cyclone: Tosses a target enemy unit into the air, rendering it unable to attack, move or cast spells for 5.5 seconds.

items.name: Scroll of Resurrection
items.description: Active Resurrection: Brings 6 nearby allied dead units back to life. Corpses last 60 seconds before disappearing. Buy only if you have a friendly mercenary unit.
items.notes: Only useful with friendly mercenary unit

items.name: Healing Salve
items.description: Non-Combat Consumable: Regenerates a target unit's hit points by 500 over 40 seconds when used.

items.name: Killmaim
items.description: The hero recovers hit points equal to 50% of the attack damage dealt to enemy units. Increases the attack damage of the hero by 50.
items.notes: Legendary - drops on hero death. Non-Stackable with other Passive Lifesteal effects.

items.name: Maul of Strength
items.description: Passive Bash: Gives a 25% chance to stun the target for 1 second and deal 3.5 bonus damage. Increases the strength of the hero by 70 and attack damage by 40.

items.name: Poisoned Blade
items.description: Unique Slow Poison: The hero's attacks become ranged, slowing the movement speed by 50% and attack rate by 50% for 8 seconds. Works with Searing Arrows, Slow and Lightning Attack. Increases the attack damage of the hero by 40.
items.notes: Legendary - drops on hero death. Unique - does not stack with other Unique effects.

items.name: Frostguard
items.description: Unique Frost Attack: The hero's attacks become ranged and slow the movement speed by 50% and attack rate by 25% for 1 second. Increases the armor of the hero by 15 and attack damage by 45.
items.notes: Legendary - drops on hero death. Unique - does not stack with other Unique effects.

items.name: Searing Blade
items.description: Unique Critical Strike: Gives a 10% chance to do 200% damage on an attack. Increases the attack damage of the hero by 60.

items.name: Bundle of Lumber
items.description: Gives 1 lumber to the player when used.

items.name: Gold Coins
items.description: Gives 300 gold to the player when used.

items.name: Tome of Experience
items.description: Gives 100 experience to the Hero when used.

items.name: Tome of Power
items.description: Increases the level of the Hero by 1 when used.

items.name: Tome of Agility +2
items.description: Permanently increases the agility of the Hero by 2 when used.

items.name: Tome of Strength +2
items.description: Permanently increases the strength of the Hero by 2 when used.

items.name: Tome of Intelligence +2
items.description: Permanently increases the intelligence of the Hero by 2 when used.

items.name: Tome of Knowledge
items.description: Permanently increases the Strength, Agility and Intelligence of the Hero by 1 when used.

items.name: Tome of Retraining
items.description: Unlearns all of the hero's spells, allowing the hero to learn different skills. Only affects abilities that are not on cooldown.

items.name: Goblin Sapper
items.description: Hires a Goblin Sapper unit (200 HP). Kaboom!: Causes a powerful area explosion, dealing 100 damage to units and buildings, but only 3.25 damage to heroes. Works on land units and trees.

items.name: Goblin Shredder
items.description: Hires a Goblin Shredder unit (600 HP). Destroy Trees: Allows to attack trees, effectively clearing them. Cuts a healthy tree down in 5 swings.

items.name: Goblin Land Mines
items.description: Places a hidden land mine at a target point. Enemy units that move over the mine activate it, destroying the mine and causing area of effect damage to nearby units.

items.name: Reveal
items.description: Reveals an area of the map and detects invisible units for 8 seconds.

items.name: Staff of Negation
items.description: Active Dispel: Dispels all magical effects in a target area. Deals 600 damage to summoned units.

items.name: Staff of Silence
items.description: Active Silence: Stops all enemies in a target area from casting spells for 6 seconds.

items.name: Cloak of Shadows
items.description: Active Shadow Meld: Provides the hero with invisibility when activated. An invisible hero is untargetable by the enemy unless detected. Invisibility is lost if the hero attacks, uses a damage spell, or casts a spell.
items.notes: Breaks on attack or spell cast

items.name: Gem of True Seeing
items.description: Passive True Sight: Allows the hero to detect hidden or invisible units in the hero's line of sight when carried.
items.notes: Item drops when the hero dies

items.name: Dagger of Escape
items.description: Increases the movement speed of the hero by 60. Active Blink: Teleports the hero a short distance of up to 900.

items.name: Corrupted Blade
items.description: Unique Corruption: The hero's attacks become ranged and reduce the armor of enemy units by 7.6 for 5 seconds. Increases the attack damage of the hero by 50.
items.notes: Legendary - drops on hero death. Unique - does not stack with other Unique effects.

items.name: Rod of Necromancy
items.description: Permanent: Creates 2 Skeleton Warriors from a corpse.

items.name: Ancestral Staff
items.description: Permanent: Summons 2 Berserkers to fight for you. Also grants the hero and friendly nearby units increased attack rate and movement speed.

items.name: Book of the Dead
items.description: Summons 3 Skeleton Warriors and 3 Skeleton Archers to fight for you. Lasts 120 seconds.

items.name: Ice Shard
items.description: Summons an Ice Revenant to fight for you. The Ice Revenant lasts 180 seconds.

items.name: Drake Egg
items.description: Summons a Blue Drake to fight for you. Lasts 180 seconds.

items.name: Stone Token
items.description: Summons a Rock Golem to fight for you. Lasts 180 seconds.

items.name: Demonic Figurine
items.description: Summons a Doom Guard to fight for you. Lasts 180 seconds. The Doom Guard has: Doom Magic (removes all buffs in area), Dire Stomp (50 dmg + 2s stun), Cripple, Rain of Fire, Resistant Skin.

items.name: Inferno Stone
items.description: Calls an Infernal down from the sky, dealing 50 damage and stunning enemy land units for 4 seconds in an area. The Infernal lasts 180 seconds. Has Permanent Immolation (15 dps), Spell Immunity, and Resistant Skin.
